properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 48/14

M/V WG TASMAN IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS AND TOWING 8 STREAMERS AT 5000 METRE LENGTH.
IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
A. 65-26,5N 007-58,3E
B. 65-06,9N 007-40,7E
C. 65-22,0N 006-34,7E
D. 65-39,0N 006-49,4E 
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 4 MILE ASTERN AND 2 MILES ABEAM.
SURVEY VESSEL STANDING BY ON VHF CH 16.
GUARD VESSEL WG COLUMBUS, DINA ALLIANCE AND MAINPORT KELLS  IN ATTENDANCE.
